candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line above EBIT, but it is not identified as COGS/cost of sales related. Since the selected COGS bucket is only 'Materials and services', there is no explicit COGS-specific D&A row to add without risking misclassification.

Component of the separate operating D&A disclosure, but not labeled as COGS-related. Also subordinate to the broader 'Depreciation and Amortization' summary, so it would not be preferred even if selected.
Granular amortization component under the operating D&A block, but not tied to COGS and would risk double counting versus the D&A summary row.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is identified as belonging to COGS/materials/cost of sales. The visible D&A rows are separate operating expense disclosures at a broad level, so conservatively do not add any row to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: This is the top-level operating D&A summary line above EBIT and sits separately alongside the selected SG&A/other operating expense rows, indicating it is not embedded in those selected parent buckets. Per summary-vs-components rule, this is preferred over the granular depreciation/amortization lines.

Separate component of the operating D&A block, but inferior to the higher-level summary row 'Depreciation and Amortization' and would risk partial capture/double counting if used with other D&A components.
Granular component within the D&A block. It appears below the D&A summary and should not be selected when the summary row exists.

variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket consists of 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' plus 'Other operating expenses'. 'Depreciation and Amortization' appears as a separate same-level operating line above EBIT rather than as a subcomponent nested under those selected rows, so it should be added separately later. No explicit R&D-specific amortization row is present.
